title: Gangaikonda Cholapuram Temple
tagline: Gangaikonda Cholapuram Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Brihadisvara Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva in Gangaikonda Cholapuram, Jayankondam, in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: The Brihadisvara Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva in Gangaikonda Cholapuram, Jayankondam, in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Completed in 1035 CE by Rajendra Chola I as a part of his new capital, this Chola dynasty era temple is similar in design, and has a similar name, as the older 11th century, Brihadeeswarar Temple about 70 kilometres (43 mi) to the southwest in Thanjavur. The Gangaikonda Cholapuram Temple is smaller yet more refined than the Thanjavur Temple. Both are among the largest Shiva temples in South India and examples of Dravidian style temples.

topPlaces.name: Gangaikonda Cholapuram
topPlaces.description: Gaṅgaikoṇḍa Chōḻapuram is a village located near to Jayankondam, Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It became the capital of the Chola dynasty in c.

topPlaces.name: Vembukudi, Ariyalur
topPlaces.description: Vembukudi is a village in the Udayarpalayam taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Amanakkanthondi
topPlaces.description: Amanakkanthondi is a village in the Udayarpalayam taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Anaikarai
topPlaces.description: Anaikarai is a village panchayat under Thiruvidaimarudur Taluk in Tanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Anaikarai connects with two major bridges.

topPlaces.name: Lower Anaicut
topPlaces.description: The Lower Anaicut or Anaikkarai is a dam and bridge built on the Kollidam (the northern distributary of Kaveri River) in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It was built in 1902 by the colonial administration of the Madras Presidency for irrigating the erstwhile South Arcot district.

topPlaces.name: Devamangalam
topPlaces.description: Devamangalam is a village in the Udayarpalayam taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. This place surrounded by many small ponds which stores rain water and gives water to the village and to the underground, all depends on the rain.

topPlaces.name: Vangudi
topPlaces.description: Vangudi is a village in the Udayarpalayam taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 235 km away from Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Jayankondam
topPlaces.description: Jayankondam is a town in Ariyalur district of Tamil Nadu in India. As of 2023, the town had a population of 46,000.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gangaikonda Cholapuram Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gangaikonda Cholapuram Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gangaikonda Cholapuram Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (94 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (95 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gangaikonda Cholapuram Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gangaikonda Cholapuram Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gangaikonda Cholapuram Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Gangaikonda Cholapuram Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gangaikonda Cholapuram Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gangaikonda Cholapuram, Vembukudi, Ariyalur, Amanakkanthondi, Anaikarai, Lower Anaicut.
